---
title: "taliesin.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\taliesin.py"
loc: 338
complexity: 52
logic_score: 4.63
style_score: 3.65
intel_score: 4.00
overall_score: 1.63
---

## Intent
The `taliesin.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on TaliesinSpoke, __init__, ingest_style, extract_rtf_text, extract_docx_text, process_directory, gather_context, generate_post, generate_scene, calculate_cohesion, staging_gate, _staging_gate_agent, _staging_gate_terminal, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TaliesinSpoke, __init__, ingest_style, extract_rtf_text, extract_docx_text, process_directory, gather_context, generate_post, generate_scene, calculate_cohesion, staging_gate, _staging_gate_agent, _staging_gate_terminal, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 66 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.x_api](file://src.sentinel.x_api)
- [zipfile](file://zipfile)
- [re](file://re)
- [argparse](file://argparse)

### Exports
- `TaliesinSpoke`
- `__init__`
- `ingest_style`
- `extract_rtf_text`
- `extract_docx_text`
- `process_directory`
- `gather_context`
- `generate_post`
- `generate_scene`
- `calculate_cohesion`
- `staging_gate`
- `_staging_gate_agent`
- `_staging_gate_terminal`
- `main`
